name: Overdue Job Work Orders
query:
SELECT
	jwo.name as "Job Work Order:Link/Job Work Order:180",
	jwo.garment_type as "Garment Type::120",
	jwo.source_item as "Source Item:Link/Item:150",
	jwo.qty_sent as "Qty Sent:Float:100",
	GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jwp.process_name ORDER BY jwp.idx ASC SEPARATOR ' → ') as "Processes::200",
	GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT jwp.contractor ORDER BY jwp.idx ASC SEPARATOR ', ') as "Contractors::180",
	MIN(jwp.expected_return_date) as "Earliest Expected Return:Date:130",
	DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MIN(jwp.expected_return_date)) as "Max Days Overdue:Int:100",
	jwo.status as "Status::120"
FROM `tabJob Work Order` jwo
LEFT JOIN `tabJob Work Order Process` jwp ON jwp.parent = jwo.name AND jwp.parenttype = 'Job Work Order'
WHERE jwo.status NOT IN ('Received', 'Closed')
	AND jwo.docstatus = 1
GROUP BY jwo.name
HAVING MIN(jwp.expected_return_date) < CURDATE()
ORDER BY MIN(jwp.expected_return_date) ASC
